title: Palace set to hold talks with Lens boss Sage
summary: Crystal Palace are in talks with Lens manager Pierre Sage to replace Oliver Glasner as head coach. The Premier League club are seeking a new manager following Glasner's departure.
content: Lens manager Pierre Sage is set to hold talks with Crystal Palace as the Premier League club look to appoint Oliver Glasner's replacement.

zh.title: 水晶宫准备与镜头俱乐部主帅萨热进行谈话
zh.summary: 水晶宫正在与镜头俱乐部主帅皮埃尔·萨热进行谈话，以取代奥利弗·格拉斯纳担任主教练。这支英超联赛俱乐部在格拉斯纳离任后正在寻求新的主教练。

title: Who should be your World Cup second team?
summary: As the World Cup approaches, fans should consider which team to support if their primary choice exits early. The article explores options for secondary team allegiance during the tournament.
content: The World Cup is almost here and you will no doubt have mapped out your team's potential route to the final, but if they exit early who should be your second team to follow at the tournament?

zh.title: 你的世界杯第二支球队应该是哪支？

title: Mexico select Ochoa for sixth World Cup
summary: Mexico goalkeeper Guillermo Ochoa has been named in the squad for this summer's World Cup, hoping to make a record-breaking sixth appearance in the tournament.
content: Guillermo Ochoa hopes to play in a record sixth World Cup after being named in Mexico's squad for this summer's tournament.

title: Sunderland's Angulo in Ecuador's World Cup squad
summary: Sunderland forward Nilson Angulo has been included in Ecuador's squad for the upcoming World Cup.
content: Sunderland forward Nilson Angulo is included in Ecuador's World Cup squad.

summary: Scotland examines lessons from recent matches as Lawrence Shankland stakes a claim for the starting XI. Midfielder Billy Gilmour has missed World Cup squad selection.

content: Heart of Midlothian are reportedly close to signing Falkirk's Calvin Miller as Celtic are linked with a couple of multi-million pound deals.

title: I leave Liverpool exactly where it belongs - Slot
summary: After being sacked as Liverpool head coach on Saturday, Arne Slot says he is leaving the club "exactly where it belongs: among Europe's elite."
content: Arne Slot says he is leaving Liverpool "exactly where it belongs: among Europe's elite" after he was sacked as head coach on Saturday.

zh.title: 我把利物浦留在了该有的位置 - 斯洛特

content: Carlo Ancelotti had to win over the Brazilian public and restore calm to chaos as he bids to return the country to World Cup glory.

summary: A documentary follows a group of Wolverhampton Wanderers fans who relocated to the United States after attending the Mexico World Cup and decided to stay.
content: A new documentary follows a group of Wolves fans who moved to the US after the Mexico World Cup.

content: Watch as a Morgan Cross goal is enough to give Celtic victory over Rangers in the Women's Scottish Cup final despite a red card for Emma Lawton.

title: 'Unacceptable' gap costing Wales young talent claim
summary: Campaigners are calling for improvements to Wales' under-21 and under-23 women's football squads to strengthen pathways from age-grade to senior international football.
content: Campaigners want to see Wales under-21 and 23 women's squads to improve pathways from age-grade to senior international football.

zh.title: 不可接受的差距正在损害威尔士年轻人才

title: Williams still hurting over Wales World Cup miss
summary: Wales international Neco Williams expresses disappointment about missing the World Cup squad, believing his team would have made a significant impact at the tournament in America.
content: Neco Williams admits missing out on this summer's World Cup still hurts because he was convinced Wales would have made an impact in America.
